commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces three filter passes in `buildGatewayStatusWarnings` with one loop that fills the reachable, scope-limited, and detail-failed probe buckets.

PR surface: Source +7. Total +7 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a performance cleanup rather than a reported user bug. Source inspection shows current `main` uses three passes and the PR changes that to one loop.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is indicated; the contributor needs to add real behavior proof, then maintainers can do ordinary review of the clean one-file refactor.

target.title: perf(gateway): classify status warning probes in one pass
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Gateway status warning generation classified probed targets with several independent filter passes. That repeated the same probe classification work when status output includes multiple probed endpoints.

## Why This Change Was Made

This preserves the warning buckets and ordering while classifying reachable, scope-limited, and detail-failed probes in a single pass. The change is limited to gateway status output formatting.

## User Impact

Users get the same gateway status warnings with less repeated work when multiple endpoints are probed.

## Evidence

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: ly-wang19
